title: Barry Tycholiz
compiled_truth: Barry Tycholiz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Barry Tycholiz sent 623 and received 1527 emails, totalling 2150 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gerald Nemec](people/gerald-nemec) (64), [Mark Whitt](people/mark-whitt) (58), [Stephanie Miller](people/stephanie-miller) (57), [Jessica Presas](people/jessica-presas) (54), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (38).
